subcodes.first_line: O thou who art enkindled with the fire of the love of God! Praise be to God that thy revered companion is as a salamander in the fire of love [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ایتها المشتعله بنار محبه الله حمد کن خدا را که قرین محترم سمندر آتش عشق است
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @love of God, @music and singing, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
